untranslatable_reason: AEDB requires pattern recognition logic to identify two distinct bottoms with specific structural characteristics (Adam: narrow with 1-2 spikes; Eve: wide with multiple spikes). This morphological pattern detection cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, and technical indicators. The signal would require candlestick pattern recognition or custom shape-detection algorithms not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Pattern-based entry conditions (two bottoms, spike counts, width measurements) are untranslatable. Provided proxy entry conditions based on reversal signal characteristics: price below SMA (downtrend), RSI below 40 (oversold). Exit condition: price crosses below SMA (trend reversal). Target regime labels preserved from source. Average rise of 40% suggests holding up to 30 days; failure rate of 5% informs 5% stop-loss.
